title0: Tired of ideas lost in the sea of forgetfulness? With
title1: they will be safe, searchable, and ready for action
login: Capture instantly, organize effortlessly, and delete with ease. Your productivity will thank you!

cloud.title: Cloud Sync
cloud.text: All your projects and tasks are securely saved on the cloud, allowing you to access them from anywhere, at any time.

management.title: Task Management
management.text: Effortlessly organize and prioritize your tasks, and stay on top of your projects with our intuitive and user-friendly interface.

collaborate.title: Collaboration
collaborate.text: Invite team members to collaborate on projects, assign tasks, and track progress in real-time.
